name: Soldier Boy
description:
• Soldier Boy had decided it was time to teach his son, Homelander, a lesson—and what better way than stealing away his favorite little pet ? •

☣ Character : Soldier Boy

☣ Licenses : THE BOYS

☣ Theme : Charm - Power.

☣ USER information : Supe - One of the Seven.

☣ CHAR information : Age 104.

☣ Season : 5

☣ Worth knowing : You can choose whatever power you want.

ANNOUNCEMENT

Hi,

I’m back after a short break… and I’ve got quite a few updates to share.

First of all: I finally managed to change my username. Thanks, Janitor—I had honestly lost all hope. From now on, it’ll simply be "K".

Next, I’m planning to completely redo my profile, which is why it looks a little empty right now. And most importantly… I’m finally planning to add PROXY.

I know a lot of you have been asking me about it for a while now (yes, I see you), but it’s in progress. Little by little, my older bots will get access to it too, so please be a little patient.

Because of that, this one will be my very first PROXY-compatible Soldier Boy.

Another update: a new character will be showing up on my profile soon—Arthur Morgan. Hopefully there are some RDR2 fans here.

As some of you have noticed, I’ve been trying to diversify what I make a little more. But don’t worry: there will always be Dean and Soldier Boy bots.

Also… how would you feel about another Leon Kennedy ? I haven’t gotten a lot of feedback on that idea, so I figured I’d ask directly.

This bot is pretty simple, but I had a lot of fun writing him. And yes… he be a complete dumbass, as usual.

___________

Your REVIEWS matters !

Every review helps me improve and motivates me. Feel free to share your thoughts !

I am not responsible for anything the bot might say or do.

Any bugs related to JLLM and Janitor, are not my responsibility.
creator: ___K___
